## Documentation Area

Which document or section should be improved?

## Problem

What is unclear, missing, outdated, or difficult to follow?

## Suggested Improvement

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Safety or Workflow Context

Does this relate to approvals, backups, logging, handoff templates, or local-first AI operations?

## Completion Condition

What should be true when this documentation update is complete?
